author: gb9t
content: Iteration 4: mlx5-lag.md committed (a5c21b4, 209 lines). Multi-port aggregation across dual-port ConnectX. 5 LAG modes (NONE/ROCE/SRIOV/MULTIPATH/MPESW) modelled as phantom-typed Lag<Mode>. LagBundle as Arc shared across two MlxCoreDev (weak from per-PF priv to break ref cycle). Grsec emphasises cross-PF tenant isolation: MPESW reg_c0[28..31] originating-PF tag closes cross-PF mix structurally, FIB-event allowlist (only routes naming both bundled PFs), 5s devcom timeout with NONE-rollback-on-both-PFs, MPESW requires both PFs in fully-trusted-host posture. Total mlx5 family docs now: 5 (mlx5-core, eswitch, mlx5-sf, mlx5-lag, mellanox-mlx5-en pre-existing). Next iteration: pivot to drivers/net/ethernet/intel/ice/ — Intel E810 100G NIC, the other huge cloud-deployed driver.
